selected: to lash out at "food" in range

system.moves:
- Burrow into soil
- Wait for prey half-buried
- Withdraw into its shell (Armor 5)

Like a snapping turtle, but 6 feet long and 400 pounds, with big, badger-like claws. Way faster than you think. It’ll dig itself under a layer of soil, and wait long enough for the gwead to start growing over it. Then, when something comes near? SNAP! An intact shell is worth quite a bit (immo- bile, Value 2). But good luck killing one without cracking the shell.
